name: ISOTeam Ltd.
summary: ISOTeam Ltd. operates in the building maintenance and estate upgrading industry in Singapore. The company operates through Repair and Redecoration; Addition and Alteration; Coatings and Paintings; and Others segments. It offers waterproofing and reroofing, improvement works, and routine maintenance services, as well as repainting, repair, and redecoration services; neighborhood renewal, hawker centers upgrading, estate upgrading, home improvement, and electrical load upgrading services; and interior design and fitting out, designing and building, home retrofit and fit-out, and property maintenance and enhancement services. The company also provides thermal insulating plasters, anti-slip floor coatings, green label intumescent fire proofing coatings, composite timber decking, renewable energy installation, and cockroaches and odor remover services; vertical gardens, horticultural, maintenance, floating wetlands, niche landscaping, and gardening and landscaping maintenance services; home care and upgrading, and general repairs and maintenance services; home painting services; and architectural and engineering solutions, including commercial addition and alteration works, building services, engineering works, architectural and commercial interior construction solutions, and advanced building technologies. In addition, it offers eco-friendly, architectural and protective, fireproofing, and industrial coating, as well as new build painting services; and electrical and mechanical ventilation works, air conditioning works, sanitary and plumbing, solar panel installation, and energy performance contract services. Further, the company leases boom, scissor, personnel, and forklifts, as well as telehandlers; and provides bike sharing services through a mobile app. It primarily serves town councils, government bodies, and private sector building owners. ISOTeam Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Singapore.
